description: Recto: Receipt of rent, in Arabic script. For al-raʾīs al-Dāwūdī, probably a Jewish communal leader, for a stable. The rent is 7 dirhams for the month of Dhū l-Qaʿda 433 H. The remainder of recto and verso have been filled with accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. The first line might also say Ṣāḥib al-Jalāla [...] al-Dāʾūdī. Needs further examination.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
